notes: Hub-impacting fixes from the multi-lens audit: speaker.h adjustVolume no longer caches the -1 SOAP-fail sentinel into spk.volume; JSON encoding now escapes control chars and " in spk.name across fleet POST and /api/speakers; /api/mappings returns all 11 gestures instead of 5; hub-side: events table grew a UNIQUE index so retries actually dedupe, and /report rejects malformed JSON with 400 instead of 500.
